properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Brother Branham preached the message Future Home, And afterwards he spoke to Billy Paul, He said “Billy, did you understand?” He said “Yes, I think I did!” Then he turned and told him “No, you didn’t, son!”

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He said “Remember, it’s not so important to understand, But it’s mighty important to believe!” From ‘47 to ‘65, we believe it’s all inspired, That Word will take the Bride into the skies!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For if God thought It, Brother Branham spoke It, We believe It, and that settles It! God’s prophets make no mistakes God’s Word cannot fail! So my friends, Let’s say what’s on the Tapes!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Many people criticize the Voice of God, They can’t understand why they would print it ALL, If Brother Branham said “… the, the, the..” That’s “Thus saith The Lord!” to me! And that Word will stand throughout eternity!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We don’t need someone to tell us what he meant, Or someone to interpret what he said, For the whole Word of God is Truth, And that is our Absolute! Brother Branham said “I am God’s Voice to you!”
